verification_gate: The model covers files, directories, code modules, configuration, planning tables, communications, application state, media and blob references, identities, permissions, history, relationships, and domain records with lossless round-trip keys under the approved store relationship.

files.round_trip_key: (root_id, relative_path, node_kind=file, mode, mtime, module_path, ordinal, blob_ref=content_sha256)

permissions.round_trip_key: (principal_id, resource_ref, resource_family, capability, grant_source, valid_from, valid_to)

history.round_trip_key: (target_entity_id, revision_no, branch_id, change_kind, before_sha256, after_sha256, valid_from)

goal_dimensions_present.schemas: each of the 12 entity_families declares concrete schema_fields plus common_columns_every_durable_family
goal_dimensions_present.stable_identities: entity_id (UUIDv7) primary key + per-family natural key + SHA-256 cross-backend identity for content-addressed classes
goal_dimensions_present.temporal_relations: bitemporal (system-time + valid-time) + revision_no/superseded_by chain + COW branch_id, unified in the revision family
goal_dimensions_present.content_addressing: SHA-256 durable content identity (BlobStore/PgStore parity) distinguished from transient BLAKE3 redb dedup cache
goal_dimensions_present.metadata: module_path/ordinal structural metadata for projection + extensible metadata jsonb per family
goal_dimensions_present.binary_references: blob family (SHA-256 content-addressed) referenced by blob_ref/attachment_refs; no inline large binaries
goal_dimensions_present.permissions: grant family (principal x resource x capability), secret-referencing not secret-embedding
goal_dimensions_present.provenance: witness_root (SHAKE256) + provenance_source jsonb on every durable row
goal_dimensions_present.graph_edges: graph_edge family with typed directed edges, MinCut weight, and RuVector semantic_embedding for GNN causal verification

gate_result.north_star_grounding: NS-WHOLE 'Company, personal, development, and home form one coherent whole' (north_star_coverage.source.csv); POSTGRES-002 anchored to NS-WHOLE / NS-CLARITY / NS-DIRECTION

store_001_alignment: Every one of the 13 user-space classes names PostgreSQL + RuVector as its single canonical durable owner exactly once, matching STORE-001 state_class_assignments[0] (durable relational macro-state) and [1] (semantic/vector/knowledge-graph state). redb holds only its intended transient roles (buffer/scratchpad/WAL/BLAKE3 dedup) with forward-only envctl sync; the blob family's redb source-blob store is explicitly transitional and cuts over to PgStore only under the verified SHA-256 BlobStore parity contract; AgentDB (.rvf) is linked as non-authoritative cognition; filesystem trees are derived projections. Secrets stay in the OS keyring per the external-secret class. This honors all five STORE-001 invariants: single durable writer, forward-only sync, verified cutover, no sidecar, and provenance preserved.
proof_summary: POSTGRES-002 defines the whole user-space as a PostgreSQL + RuVector relational + knowledge-graph model in generated/postgres_user_space_schema_plan.json. All thirteen gate classes are each assigned exactly one canonical owner: files and directories to fs_node (unified node_kind table with module_path/ordinal projection and blob_ref content identity), code modules to code_unit (AST-fragment rows whose (module_path, ordinal, raw_code) concatenation regenerates exact source files), configuration to config_record (secret values externalized to keyring handles), planning tables to planning_record (projection contract deferred to POSTGRES-003), communications to communication (thread-ordered, only settled traces flushed from redb), application state to app_state (settled checkpoints flushed from the redb scratchpad/WAL, live state read via UDS), media and blob references to the content-addressed blob BlobStore keyed by SHA-256 with redb->PgStore parity cutover, identities to principal (user/account/agent/service/node with keyring credential_ref), permissions to grant (principal x resource x capability, revocation preserved as history), history to the append-only revision spine (bitemporal + COW branch lineage + SHAKE256 witness chain + PITR), relationships to graph_edge (typed directed edges with MinCut weight and RuVector GNN embeddings), and domain records to domain_record across the four North Star whole-life domains company/personal/development/home unified by belongs_to_domain edges. Each class carries a lossless round-trip key (identity + content_sha256 + structural metadata + temporal + provenance) sufficient to reconstruct its original meaning and, for byte-exact classes, its exact bytes via envctl exact-byte materialization and BlobStore parity. The model sits entirely under the STORE-001 approved store relationship: PostgreSQL + RuVector is the single durable writer of every class, redb keeps only its transient buffer/scratchpad/WAL/BLAKE3-dedup roles with forward-only envctl sync, the transitional redb source-blob store migrates to PgStore only after a green blobstore_parity.rs run under one SHA-256 identity, RuVector runs native (No-Sidecar), and secrets never enter the model. No live schema was mutated, no user data was read, no credential values were handled; this is a planning artifact only.
grounding_sources: 1.0_VISION/Notebooklm/Architecture Context Matrix_ PostgreSQL-First LifeOS Framework - Table 1.csv
